violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets along the dairy department were observed in poor repair. Per PIC, replacement gaskets are on-site and establishment is awaiting installation. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
Walk-in cooler has minor accumulation of condensation. Fan guard in walk-in cooler is in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024

The floors under dry goods and pet foods on the sales floor have minor accumulation of dust; shelving in rice area have minor accumulation of rice The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC contacted maintenance to clean areas during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
